venue_lead: Alma Cafe, 37 rue de Montreuil, Vincennes (Paris) — dog-friendly cafe discovered via @alfie_friendly post, candidate for Paris directory

note: Verified IG account posting weekly Atlanta dog-friendly event guides (festivals, meetups, adoption events). Strong partner/source candidate for Atlanta events pipeline + Zoe intro.
Boutique hotel Upper West Side, actively marketing pet-friendly stays + lobby coffee. Claim/partner candidate.
Nyla Cafe, Williamsburg Brooklyn - French cafe with resident mascot dog Charlie, actively posts #DogFriendlyNYC. Listing/claim candidate.
Tikis Tokyo - verified Hawaiian dining at Yoyogi Park (BE STAGE 1F) with full dog menu. Prime Tokyo listing/partner lead.
The Lovejoy Foundation - adoption events every Sat+Sun 11am-5pm, 1121 Hillcrest Blvd Inglewood CA 90301. Actionable recurring LA event: address + IG handle. Candidate for /events.
PARLORS cafe, Bakuro-Yokoyama / Nihonbashi, Chuo ward Tokyo - dogs OK inside (店内OK). Found via influencer post. Tokyo listing candidate.
Buddys Dog Den - Manhattan UES doggy daycare. NYC listing candidate.
Dogtown - London doggy daycare, active IG. London listing candidate.
Pupstudio - verified NYC grooming studio, high engagement posts. NYC listing candidate.

4* Albana Hotel Silvaplana (Engadin Valley, nr St. Moritz) DMd us 1d ago replying to our comment on their post: We are actually in the Engadin Valley. Hope to welcome you soon. Warm inbound - future Swiss-expansion/travel-content contact.
